OKE.text: Create an Engineering Operating System capable of coordinating multiple engineering specialists.
It consists of independent specialists working together.
OKE must remain understandable, extensible, and maintainable even as new specialists, commands, workflows, and intelligence layers are added.
# Import specialists to trigger BaseSpecialist auto-registration
